name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: promise
entities.brief: Promise made in job posting or during hiring process
entities.description:
Tracks promises made by employers: salary ranges, response timelines,
process steps, etc. These are compared against actual outcomes to measure
transparency. Examples: "We'll respond within 2 weeks", "Salary range
$80k-$100k", "3 interview rounds".

fields.name: job_posting_id
fields.description: Reference to job posting where promise was made

fields.name: promise_text
fields.description: Text of the promise (e.g., 'We'll respond within 2 weeks')

fields.name: promised_value_min
fields.description: Minimum promised value (for numeric promises like salary)

fields.name: promised_value_max
fields.description: Maximum promised value (for numeric promises like salary)

fields.name: promised_timeline_days
fields.description: Promised timeline in days (e.g., 14 for '2 weeks')

fields.name: was_kept
fields.description: Whether the promise was kept (verified against actual outcomes)

fields.name: verification_date
fields.description: Date when promise fulfillment was verified (YYYY-MM-DD)
